title: PARENT CHILD INTERACTION THERAPY - 211info
text: NEUROTHERAPEUTIC PEDIATRIC THERAPIES HILLSBORO PARENT CHILD INTERACTION THERAPY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers therapeutic coaching sessions in which the therapist observes play sessions between parent and child and provides real-time feedback. Aids parents in learning the skills to manage behaviors such as tantrums, defiance, argumentativeness, aggression, and poor focus. 5289 NE Elam Young Parkway #140 Hillsboro, OR 97124 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by appointment Email (503) 372-5147 6 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 372-5147 ext 6 Anna Waite/Kady Richardson Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Accepts OHP and most private insurance plans. Existing clients may request financial assistance for therapy costs. Scholarships are dependent upon availability of funds. DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Cities of Canby, Hillsboro, Oregon City, Portland, and Wilsonville SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: MAX stop nearby Services: Parent Child Interactive Therapy Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MENTAL HEALTH THERAPIES REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - OCCUPATIONAL AND PHYSICAL THERAPY REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - SPEECH THERAPY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
